operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV refers to Geek+ Automated Guided Vehicles
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide defines AGVs as Automated Guided Vehicles and identifies the platform in use as Geek+ AGVs.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGVs means Automated Guided Vehicles. This slide identifies the vehicles in this system as Geek+ AGVs.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes and are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The AGVs navigate using QR codes and are directly controlled by the Geek+ RMS system.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes. They are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Geek+ determines AGV movement and selects the route from point A to point B
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Movement handling and route selection are performed by the Geek+ system rather than manually by an operator, including determining the best route between two points.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Geek+ determines the best route to nagivate from point A to point B'

relationships.to: AGV path from point A to point B

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Geek+ handles all AGV movement and determines the best route for the AGV to navigate from point A to point B.

operational_knowledge_units.title: These AGVs include forward collision sensors
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The AGV version shown on the slide is equipped with forward collision sensors.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'These AGVs have forward collision sensors'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: These Geek+ AGVs have forward collision sensors.

operational_knowledge_units.title: This AGV version is intended for operation in a fenced system
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that this version of AGVs is intended to operate inside a fenced system.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'This version of AGVs are intended to operate in a fenced system.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: This version of AGVs is intended to operate in a fenced system.
